spec_natural_language: function increaseLiquidity MUST revert when the caller is not the owner or an authorized operator of the specified tokenId

violated_invariant.precondition: msg.sender is not the owner of params.tokenId AND msg.sender is not an approved operator for params.tokenId
violated_invariant.expected_behavior: The function should revert with an authorization error when an unauthorized user attempts to increase liquidity for a token position they do not own or are not approved to operate

extraction_reasoning: The finding clearly states that the increaseLiquidity function lacks the isAuthorizedForToken modifier, allowing unauthorized users to manipulate liquidity for positions they don't own. The vulnerability, affected function, and fix are all explicitly described with specific code references.
